description: Create 3 more infrastructure packages: packages/payments (gateway abstraction, subscriptions, wallet, invoicing, revenue sharing, tax), packages/moderation (AI content classification, text/image/video moderation, reports, appeals, auto-actions, trust scoring), packages/i18n (translation management, RTL, locale detection, formatting, pluralization, 20+ languages)
steps: Create packages/payments/src/types.ts - PaymentMethod, Transaction, Subscription, Plan, Invoice, Wallet, RefundRequest, RevenueShare, TaxCalculation, etc.
Create packages/payments/src/services/gateway-service.ts - PaymentGateway class: charge(), refund(), createCustomer(), attachPaymentMethod(), listMethods() with Stripe/PayPal abstraction
Create packages/payments/src/services/subscription-service.ts - SubscriptionService: create(), upgrade(), downgrade(), cancel(), pause(), resume(), applyTrial(), checkStatus()
Create packages/payments/src/services/wallet-service.ts - WalletService: getBalance(), credit(), debit(), transfer(), getTransactionHistory(), freeze(), setLimits()
Create packages/payments/src/services/invoice-service.ts - InvoiceService: generate(), send(), markPaid(), getOverdue(), applyDiscount(), calculateTax(), export()
Create packages/payments/src/services/revenue-sharing-service.ts - RevenueSharing: setShareRatio(), calculatePayout(), processPayouts(), getCreatorEarnings(), generateReport()
Create packages/payments/src/services/tax-service.ts - TaxService: calculateTax(), getRate(), validateTaxId(), generateTaxReport(), getJurisdiction(), applyExemptions()
Create packages/payments/src/index.ts - Barrel export
Create packages/moderation/src/types.ts - ContentClassification, ModerationAction, TrustScore, ReportStatus, AppealStatus, AutoRule, ModerationQueueItem, etc.
Create packages/moderation/src/services/content-classifier.ts - ContentClassifier: classify(), getConfidence(), trainModel(), batchClassify() with NSFW/violence/hate categories
Create packages/moderation/src/services/text-moderator.ts - TextModerator: moderate(), checkProfanity(), scoreToxicity(), detectHateSpeech(), detectSpam(), filterContent()
Create packages/moderation/src/services/image-moderator.ts - ImageModerator: moderate(), detectNudity(), detectViolence(), checkWatermarks(), getContentRating()
Create packages/moderation/src/services/video-moderator.ts - VideoModerator: moderate(), sampleFrames(), detectScenes(), analyzeAudio(), getTimelineFlags()
Create packages/moderation/src/services/report-handler.ts - ReportHandler: createReport(), assignReviewer(), resolveReport(), escalate(), getQueue(), getPrioritized()
Create packages/moderation/src/services/appeal-service.ts - AppealService: createAppeal(), review(), approve(), deny(), getAppealHistory(), autoReview()
Create packages/moderation/src/services/auto-action-engine.ts - AutoActionEngine: defineRule(), evaluate(), executeAction(), getActionLog(), rollback()
Create packages/moderation/src/services/trust-score-service.ts - TrustScoreService: calculateScore(), updateScore(), getFactors(), penalize(), reward(), getHistory()
Create packages/moderation/src/index.ts - Barrel export
Create packages/i18n/src/types.ts - Locale, TranslationKey, PluralForm, NumberFormat, DateFormat, Direction, TranslationNamespace, etc.
Create packages/i18n/src/core/translation-manager.ts - TranslationManager: t(), addTranslations(), getLocale(), setLocale(), hasTranslation(), getMissing(), interpolate()
Create packages/i18n/src/core/locale-detector.ts - LocaleDetector: detect(), fromBrowser(), fromHeader(), fromCookie(), fromUrl(), getFallback()
Create packages/i18n/src/core/formatter.ts - Formatter: formatNumber(), formatCurrency(), formatDate(), formatRelativeTime(), formatList(), formatUnit()
Create packages/i18n/src/core/pluralizer.ts - Pluralizer: pluralize(), getRule(), addRule() with rules for English, Arabic, Russian, Polish, etc.
Create packages/i18n/src/core/rtl-support.ts - RTLSupport: isRTL(), getDirection(), flipLayout(), mirrorCSS(), getAlignments()
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/en.ts - English translations (200+ keys across all app contexts)
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/hi.ts - Hindi translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/es.ts - Spanish translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/fr.ts - French translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/ar.ts - Arabic translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/zh.ts - Chinese (Simplified) translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/ja.ts - Japanese translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/ko.ts - Korean translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/de.ts - German translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/pt.ts - Portuguese translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/ru.ts - Russian translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/it.ts - Italian translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/tr.ts - Turkish translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/vi.ts - Vietnamese translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/th.ts - Thai translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/id.ts - Indonesian translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/nl.ts - Dutch translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/pl.ts - Polish translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/sv.ts - Swedish translations
Create packages/i18n/src/locales/bn.ts - Bengali translations
Create packages/i18n/src/index.ts - Barrel export all i18n modules
acceptance_criteria: packages/payments/src/index.ts exists with exports for PaymentGateway, SubscriptionService, WalletService, InvoiceService, RevenueSharing, TaxService
packages/moderation/src/index.ts exists with exports for ContentClassifier, TextModerator, ImageModerator, VideoModerator, ReportHandler, AppealService, AutoActionEngine, TrustScoreService
packages/i18n/src/index.ts exists with exports for TranslationManager, LocaleDetector, Formatter, Pluralizer, RTLSupport, and all locale files
20+ locale files exist in packages/i18n/src/locales/ with substantial translation content
Each service file has 200-400 lines of real business logic
Payment services include proper error handling for declined cards, insufficient funds, etc.
Moderation services include confidence scoring and threshold-based auto-actions
verification: Run: node scripts/test.js - should pass without errors
Verify all 3 new packages have proper barrel exports in src/index.ts
findings: All 3 packages created successfully with 46 files totaling 8809 lines. Test passes. Node.js NODE_OPTIONS must be unset to run scripts due to missing bootstrap module. Locale files generated via helper script. Video moderator had variable scope issue that was fixed.
